result:
`python verify.py` exits 0 — both tests pass.

Added a single `@app.middleware('http')` handler that records only `method`, `path`, `status_code`, `duration_ms`, and `correlation_id` (uses `x-correlation-id` when present, else `uuid4().hex`). Authorization headers and bodies never enter the event. No tests edited.

Skipped: a dedicated logging/middleware class, a JSON serializer — the test reads events as dicts, and one inline middleware is the shortest thing that holds.
